UHA-21  APPLICATION OF SECTION IX TO HIGH ALLOY STEELS. (a) Welding procedures for high alloy steels shall be qualified in accordance with QW-200 of Section IX. (b) Essential variables for high alloy welding shall include those listed in QW-250 plus the additional variables specified in this paragraph. (c) Welders shall be qualified per QW-300 for the specific filler metal group. Filler metals shall comply with QW-404. See also UHA-32 for special welding requirements. Postweld heat treatment shall be as required by UHA-34. Refer to UW-26 for the list of permitted welding processes.
